metadata.description: Chewiesoft's Claude Code plugin marketplace — skills and commands for development workflows

plugins.name: cicd
plugins.description: Unified CI/CD troubleshooting and pipeline configuration for GitHub Actions, Docker, GHCR, and self-hosted runners

plugins.name: deploy
plugins.description: Automated deployment commands — staging and production pipelines via CD

plugins.name: codereview
plugins.description: Automated pre-PR code review inspired by The Zen of Python (PEP 20). Produces severity-rated findings, test coverage assessment, and letter grading. Stack-agnostic with TypeScript/React defaults.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Interactive setup for Claude Code status line — customize model info, context bar, git branch, cost tracking, and more. Cross-platform: Bash + PowerShell.

plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Automated GitHub Release creation with categorized release notes from git history
